# Viện IDEAS — Codebase Workspace & Academic Portal

Viện IDEAS (Viện Nghiên cứu Đào tạo và Hỗ trợ Học vụ) is a leading academic portal, advisory, and student support center in Vietnam. This repository hosts the WordPress custom theme, static HTML landing pages, and API integrations for the official web portal.

## Codebase Architecture & Structure

This project is built using a hybrid structure consisting of a custom WordPress theme and high-performance static HTML marketing landing pages.

### Key Directories
- **WordPress Custom Theme**: [`wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/)
  - [`functions.php`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/functions.php): Custom backend hooks, dynamic AJAX live search endpoints, asset loading, and script registrations.
  - [`shared-header.php`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/shared-header.php): Unified responsive navigation bar and mobile drawer header loaded across page templates.
  - [`page-swiss-umef.php`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/page-swiss-umef.php): Main institutional landing page for Swiss UMEF partner programs.
  - [`archive.php`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/archive.php) / [`category.php`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/category.php) / [`search.php`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/search.php): Unified premium responsive category grid layouts and live search results views.
  - [`404.php`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/404.php): Custom error display with integrated live search input.
- **Static Marketing Landing Pages**: [`wp-content/new_public/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/new_public/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/)
  - Contains responsive HTML templates for specific academic programs.
  - Vietnamese templates: `bba.html` (Top-up BBA), `fullbba.html` (Full BBA), `mba.html` (Online MBA), `emba.html` (Executive MBA), `mbainai.html` (MBA in AI), `mscai.html` (MSc in AI), `dual-dba.html` (Dual DBA).
  - English templates: Located under the `en/` subdirectory (e.g., `en/bba.html`, `en/mba.html`, etc.).
- **Common Shared Assets**: [`wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/common-assets/`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/wp-content/themes/LANDINGPAGE_MBA/common-assets/)
  - `css/style.css`: Core theme stylesheet containing responsiveness modules and trust layouts.
  - `css/style.min.css`: Minified production stylesheet generated using the build tools.
  - `js/variables.js` / `variables-en.js`: Dynamically injected configuration scripts, testimonial assets, and chat-widget metadata.

### Server Rewrites & Routing
- [`.htaccess`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/.htaccess): Houses redirection logic mapping root requests (e.g., `/bba`, `/mba`) to the physical static HTML templates. Bypasses rewrites for dynamic search query strings (`?s=...`) to route search requests directly to WordPress front controllers.

### Build Tools
- [`scratch/minify.py`](file:///e:/IDEAS_WP_UI/scratch/minify.py): Helper python script that minifies style blocks and compresses `style.css` into `style.min.css` for deployment.

---

## Technical Integrations & APIs

### 1. Dynamic Lead Form Submission
Forms submit asynchronously to two parallel endpoints:
- **Core lead logging**: `https://automation.ideas.edu.vn/mail_api/forms.php?route=submit` (using `form_id: "4fe1eeb0570742a1fdde61af6fc0680c"`).
- **Sales Metas & Webhooks**: `https://open.domation.net/sale_data/webhook.php?token=tok_kjhbs32a`.
- **Conversion Tracking**: Google Ads conversion tags are fired (`AW-11205917800/mdXJCOTL-bccEOj4st8p`) upon successful asynchronous API response.

### 2. Autocomplete Live Search Suggestion Engine
- **Backend API Handler**: `ideas_live_search` hook in `functions.php` queries the database for the top 5 matching posts based on title keywords and returns JSON payloads.
- **Frontend Controller**: footer script in `functions.php` listens to inputs (`input[name="s"]`). Features a `300ms` debounce timer, `AbortController` to handle input race conditions, and automatic browser suggestions override (`autocomplete="off"`). The suggest cards render on top of the layout wrapper using `overflow: visible` hero container positioning.

---

## Academic Programs & Institutional Pointers

Viện IDEAS advises and provides academic support for the following degree pathways:

### 1. Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA)
- **Top-up BBA (12-Month Accelerated BBA)**:
  - **Audience**: College graduates (3-year degree holders) or year-3 university students looking to top-up to a global Bachelor's degree.
  - **Degree Awarded**: Swiss UMEF University (Geneva, Switzerland).
  - **Portal Target**: https://ideas.edu.vn/bba
- **Full BBA (3-Year Standard BBA)**:
  - **Audience**: High school graduates.
  - **Degree Awarded**: Swiss UMEF University (Geneva, Switzerland).
  - **Portal Target**: https://ideas.edu.vn/fullbba

### 2. Master of Business Administration (MBA)
- **Online MBA (18-Month Online Pathway)**:
  - **Audience**: Working professionals and managers seeking a flexible schedule.
  - **Degree Awarded**: Swiss UMEF University (Geneva, Switzerland).
  - **Portal Target**: https://ideas.edu.vn/mba
- **Executive MBA (EMBA)**:
  - **Audience**: Mid-to-senior executives and business owners.
  - **Degree Awarded**: Swiss UMEF University (Geneva, Switzerland).
  - **Portal Target**: https://ideas.edu.vn/emba
- **MBA in Artificial Intelligence (MBA in AI)**:
  - **Audience**: Managers looking to specialize in practical enterprise AI implementation.
  - **Degree Awarded**: Swiss UMEF University (Geneva, Switzerland).
  - **Portal Target**: https://ideas.edu.vn/mbainai

### 3. Master of Science (MSc)
- **MSc in Artificial Intelligence (MSc AI)**:
  - **Audience**: Tech leaders, developers, and researchers focusing on technical enterprise AI.
  - **Degree Awarded**: Swiss UMEF University (Geneva, Switzerland).
  - **Portal Target**: https://ideas.edu.vn/mscai

### 4. Doctor of Business Administration (DBA)
- **Dual DBA (Song bằng Tiến sĩ Pháp & Anh)**:
  - **Audience**: Senior scholars and corporate directors.
  - **Degree Awarded**: Simultaneous dual Doctorates from accredited universities in France and the United Kingdom.
  - **Portal Target**: https://ideas.edu.vn/dual-dba

---

## Legal & Partner Verification References

- **Official Accreditation Listings**:
  - Swiss UMEF Partner Directory: [https://www.swiss-umef.ch/en/partenaires](https://www.swiss-umef.ch/en/partenaires) (Confirms IDEAS as the official authorized educational partner in Vietnam).
- **Institution Profile**:
  - Swiss Accreditation Council (SAC) Credentials: Swiss UMEF is the first private higher education institution in Geneva to achieve federal institutional accreditation (SAC).
- **Vietnam Office Entity**:
  - **Tax ID / Mã số thuế**: 0318949449
  - **Hotline**: 028 2244 2244
  - **Official Email**: info@ideas.edu.vn
  - **Office Address**: Tầng 4, Tòa nhà Hải Âu, 39B Trường Sơn, Phường Tân Sơn Nhất, Quận Tân Bình, TP. Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam.
